Latest Release
IT'S ME (SONIC WANDERER LP)
YEHOSUA HIMSELF  ·  Sound of God Recordings  ·  2026
New Release
01
Behind the Music

THE ARTIST

◈  The Sonic Journey · 2025

In January 2025, he made it literal — crossing the Alps on foot, south to Tarifa at the edge of Africa, north to Copenhagen, then down to Rome. Over 10,000 km. No tour bus. A backpack and a pair of decks.

Read the full journey  →
YEHOSUA HIMSELF builds sets from the inside out — starting with structure, ending in momentum. Behind the music is a decade of obsessive craft: hardware synthesis, precise mixing, and a reading of the room that goes beyond technical skill. When the floor locks in, something shifts. Call it presence. Call it timing. The result is the same.

FANS OF  /  FOR FANS OF

Lisa Kaufmann Charlotte de Witte Christian Craken Mekkanikka
"I've heard of him but did not believe this was real until I heard him play."
Featured Mix

PEAK AT KINGDOM FESTIVAL

02
The Journey

THE SONIC WANDERER

On January 1st, 2025, YEHOSUA HIMSELF left the Alps on foot. No tour bus. No manager. No map. No phone. A backpack, a pair of decks, and a route drawn across the spine of Europe — and back.

Alps → South · Jan 2025
Gear laid out
On the road

03
Frequency

THE SOUND

Two sonic territories. One convergence. YEHOSUA HIMSELF moves between the dark mechanical precision of Techno and the transcendent release of Psytrance with the fluency of a native speaker.

Welcome to Eternity
ABOUT THE LABEL
01

Sound of God Recordings exists at the intersection of architecture and instinct. We release music that is structurally demanding and physically unavoidable — built for the 4am hour when only the honest are still on the floor. Every artist on our roster walks between worlds: the underground and the festival, the sacred and the mechanical. We excavate sound from the places most labels fear to go — damp basements, raw concrete, the 4am hour when only the honest are still standing.

SOUND OF GOD RECORDINGS was built by artists, for artists. Every release is a statement. Every event is a ritual. Every track we put out carries the weight of a decision: this matters, this is real, this belongs in the world.

We operate across the spectrum — from the upperground to the underground. Sound has no ceiling and no floor.

ELECTRIC SUNSET PEAK — AGUA, TARIFA
Soundcloud used only internally and for press

"The universe is created by frequency."

— YEHOSUA HIMSELF

The Sonic Identity
CORE

We reject sonic cleanliness. Our catalogue lives in the frequencies that rattle ribs and blur vision — deep, dense, deliberate. Each release undergoes our analogue mastering process, preserving the weight and imperfection of real sound.

Coverage
Press

"SOUND OF GOD RECORDINGS has quietly become one of the most important independent labels operating in the European underground. Every release feels like a manifesto."

Underground Wire Magazine — 2025

"YEHOSUA HIMSELF's REVELATION is a landmark record. Dense, deliberate, and brutally beautiful — the product of a label that refuses to compromise."

Frequency Journal — 2025

"A label run on integrity alone. In an era of algorithmic noise, SOUND OF GOD RECORDINGS sounds like a fist through drywall."

Bassline Review — 2025
Connect
Get in Touch

We listen to every demo. We read every message. We don't move fast — but we move with intention. If what you make belongs here, we want to hear it.

Booking & Press Access

YEHOSUA
HIMSELF

DJ  ·  Producer  ·  Sonic Wanderer Techno  /  Psytrance

2025  ·  Algarve, Portugal
Latest Release
IT'S ME —
SONIC WANDERER LP
Single  ·  Sound of God Recordings  ·  2025
(SONIC WANDERER LP)
YEHOSUA HIMSELF—SOUND OF GOD RECORDINGS [internal]  ·  IT'S ME (SONIC WANDERER LP)
01
The Sonic Identity

THE
SOUND

YEHOSUA HIMSELF navigates two sovereign sonic territories — the dark mechanical precision of Techno and the transcendent release of Psytrance — with the fluency of a native speaker. These are not genres he plays. They are languages he thinks in.

The meeting point of these frequencies is where the architecture becomes spiritual. The convergence is not blending — it is alchemy.

Techno
Industrial Precision · Structure · Drive
⟵   Convergence   ⟶
Psytrance
Transcendence · Release · Ceremony
02
Selected Tracks

THE SET

01  ·  Featured
Peak at Kingdom Festival
02  ·  Featured
Closing at Tunes of Sand
03  ·  Festival
Peak at Tunes of Sand
04  ·  Ohana
Piano B2B – Ohana, Los Caños de Meca
More on SoundCloud
@yehosuahimself  →
03
Tech Rider

THE
STAGE

"The dancefloor is not the destination.
It is the vehicle."

A YEHOSUA HIMSELF performance is engineered with the same intentionality as the music itself. The opening is always deliberate — Minimal, meditative, patient — casting a sonic net across the room and drawing the audience into a shared frequency. Then the architecture unfolds across three acts: the build, the peak, the transcendence.

For luxury venues and private events on the Côte d'Azur, YEHOSUA HIMSELF adapts the arc to context — reading the room with acute precision, managing the energy of HNW crowds who expect entertainment and elevation simultaneously.

Performance Formats
01DJ Set — 1 to 6 hours
02B2B DJ Set — Available on request
03Live + DJ Hybrid Set — CDJ + Hardware Electronics
04Private Events & Yacht Sets
05Residency Format — Weekly or Monthly
Downloads & Press
Full Press Kit — Google Drive Sets · Photos · Riders · Stage Plot · Artwork
04
TECHNICAL RIDER

TECHNICAL
REQUIREMENTS

Please read this rider in full before confirming the booking. These requirements are non-negotiable and ensure optimal performance quality.

Rev. VERSION 3 · MARCH 21st 2026
DJ Setup — Mandatory
CDJ Units3× Pioneer CDJ-3000
Mixer — PreferredAllen & Heath Xone:96 or Xone:92
Mixer — AcceptablePioneer DJM-A9 or DJM-900NXS2
Faders / EQAll channels fully functional
USB Ports4× fully operational (no tape)
RCA / Booth OutputDedicated booth output required
Headphone AmpIn-mixer or dedicated amp
Backup SetupAdditional CDJ-2000NXS2 on standby preferred
Ground-Loop IsolationRequired — no hum acceptable
Note on CDJ-3000: No substitutions. Allen & Heath Xone:96 is the preferred mixer — warm analogue signal path, superior filter response. All rotary mixer requests require prior written approval.
Sound System
Main Systemd&b, L-Acoustics, or Meyer Sound
Subwoofer CoverageFull dancefloor, no dead zones
SPL (max peak)110 dB minimum capability
Monitor / Wedge1× monitor mix at DJ booth
System EngineerDedicated engineer throughout set
SoundcheckMinimum 30 minutes before doors
Lighting
Lighting DeskDedicated operator strongly preferred
CommunicationClear comms between DJ booth and tech
Stage PlotAvailable on request via Google Drive
Technical Setup Note

YEHOSUA HIMSELF performs on a 3-CDJ setup (Pioneer CDJ-3000 or equivalent Pioneer CDJs) with an Allen & Heath Xone:92 / 96 (alternatively Pioneer DJM-900NXS2 mixer or equivalent Pioneer Mixer), optionally integrating hardware synthesis, and custom FX processing for real-time layered production elements.

05
HOSPITALITY RIDER

HOSPITALITY &
WORKING CONDITIONS

Accommodation
  • Hotel CategoryQuality 4–5 star, appropriate to venue market
  • Room TypeStandard double or superior, non-smoking
  • Check-InEarly check-in where possible
  • Check-OutLate check-out requested (by 14:00)
  • Additional RoomIf touring manager accompanies — agreed per booking
  • LocationMaximum 20-min transfer from venue
  • DurationNight before + night of event as standard
Dressing Room
  • RoomPrivate, lockable, en-suite bathroom required
  • CapacityMinimum 2 persons comfortably
  • TemperatureClimate-controlled, 21–23°C
  • MirrorFull-length, well-lit
  • Iron & BoardOr garment steamer
  • WifiPrivate password, minimum 50 Mbps
  • AccessFrom 3h before soundcheck to 1h after performance
  • SecuritySecured access — no unauthorised entry
Catering
  • Water6× still mineral water (500ml), 2× sparkling
  • FruitFresh seasonal, and regional fruit platter
  • Nuts & SnacksMixed nuts, protein bars, light finger food
  • Hot BeveragesEspresso machine or high-quality coffee, herbal teas
  • Soft Drinks4× Pepsi, 2× sugar-free
  • Energy Drinks2× Red Bull (standard, not sugar-free)
  • MealHot meal or quality catering 3h before set (preferably vegetarian)
  • Post-ShowLight supper / snack post-performance
Transport
  • Airport TransferRequired for all international bookings — comfortable executive saloon
  • Local TransportProvided by promoter throughout stay
  • FlightsTo be agreed per booking
  • LuggageAdequate for equipment and personal items
  • DriverEnglish-speaking preferred

07
PRESS & REVIEWS

WHAT THEY
WITNESSED

“A DJ who moves between genres not as a party trick but as a practitioner of total sonic consciousness. His sets do not blend — they transmute. A commanding live presence that leaves rooms changed.

Press
01

“Where most DJ sets are exercises in taste, YEHOSUA HIMSELF delivers an exercise in long-form architecture. The structural intelligence behind each transition rewards patience and punishes distraction. This is music made for people who mean it.

Music Media
02

“We booked Yehosua on a recommendation and by midnight he had the room completely. We have not seen a crowd that unified in this space in over a decade. He understands that luxury clientele requires both sophistication and release. A rare combination.

Venue Operator
03
08
